curation_notes: Re-curation with updated hints. The patch commit c20cfa8 (PR #151) adds an 'else { return; }' branch in the grow method of lib.rs to prevent deallocation when the requested capacity equals the current capacity of a spilled SmallVec. The vulnerability location was derived from the patch diff which modifies only lib.rs in the grow function. The advisory explicitly describes calling grow with a value equal to the current capacity on a spilled vector. CWE-415 (Double Free) maps to use-after-free since the freed memory is subsequently accessed. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. L3 hints were differentiated from L1/L2 to provide narrower targeting.
